name: AnimateAnyMesh
description: [ICCV 2025] Official code for AnimateAnyMesh: A Feed-Forward 4D Foundation Model for Text-Driven Universal Mesh Animation
readme_summary: AnimateAnyMesh is a feed-forward 4D foundation model designed for universal mesh animation. It takes a static 3D mesh and a text prompt as input to generate high-quality animations efficiently in seconds.
key_features: DyMesh Dataset and VAE/RF models released
primary_use_case: Generating animated 3D meshes from static meshes and text descriptions.
cover_image_prompt: A sculptor in a digital studio, holding a static 3D mesh model of a creature. With a glowing tablet displaying a text prompt like 'the creature roars', the sculptor gestures, and the mesh springs to life, dynamically animating with fluid motion. Streams of digital particles representing the text prompt flow from the tablet to the mesh, causing it to animate. The background shows a clean, modern interface with subtle code snippets and data visualizations. The overall mood is creative and futuristic, with soft, focused lighting. The style is a 3D isometric illustration with vibrant, clean colors, clearly showing the transformation from static to dynamic.

name: deptry
description: Find unused, missing and transitive dependencies in a Python project.
readme_summary: Deptry is a Python command-line tool designed to identify and report dependency issues in Python projects. It checks for unused, missing, and transitive dependencies by analyzing imported modules against the project's declared dependencies.
key_features: Supports Poetry, pip, PDM, uv, and PEP 621 projects
Scans imported modules against declared dependencies
Configurable via command line arguments and pyproject.toml
primary_use_case: To help Python developers maintain clean and accurate dependency lists in their projects, preventing issues caused by outdated, missing, or unnecessary packages.
cover_image_prompt: A meticulous librarian in a vast, organized library, carefully examining each book (representing project dependencies). The librarian uses a magnifying glass to check if each book is actually being read (imported modules) or if there are any missing books on the shelves (missing dependencies). Unused books are gently placed on a 'to-remove' cart, while missing books are highlighted with a glowing question mark. Subtle digital elements like floating code snippets and dependency graphs are visible in the background. The scene is well-lit and clean, emphasizing order and accuracy. The style is a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clarity and detail, featuring a color palette of blues, greens, and subtle metallic accents.

name: termora
description: Termora is a terminal emulator and SSH client for Windows, macOS and Linux.
readme_summary: Termora is a cross-platform terminal emulator and SSH client for Windows, macOS, and Linux, built with Kotlin/JVM. It aims for full platform support and offers features like a built-in key manager, X11 forwarding, SSH-Agent integration, and GUI-based SFTP file management.
key_features: Plugin support (Geo, Sync, WebDAV, Editor, SMB, S3, Huawei OBS, Tencent COS, Alibaba OSS)
primary_use_case: Providing a modern, feature-rich terminal emulator and SSH client for developers and system administrators across multiple operating systems.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized robot assistant holding a glowing, multi-faceted crystal that displays different terminal windows and file transfer interfaces within its facets. The robot is standing on a stylized globe, with subtle digital streams flowing from the globe to the crystal, representing data transfer and connectivity. Small icons representing different operating systems (Windows, macOS, Linux) float around the scene. The overall mood is helpful and efficient, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style with a vibrant, tech-focused color palette, emphasizing ease of use and comprehensive functionality.

name: DeepTutor
description: DeepTutor: Agent-native, Open-sourced Personalized Tutoring. https://deeptutor.info/.
readme_summary: DeepTutor is an open-source, agent-native personalized tutoring system designed to provide interactive learning experiences. It leverages large language models and multi-agent systems, incorporating Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for enhanced knowledge retrieval and personalized responses.
primary_use_case: To provide a personalized and interactive AI-powered tutoring experience for learners, adapting to individual needs and learning styles.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, friendly owl wearing spectacles, perched on a stack of glowing digital books. The owl is actively 'teaching' by projecting holographic diagrams and interactive learning modules into the air, which are being absorbed by a curious student represented by a silhouette. Subtle data streams flow from the books to the owl, symbolizing knowledge retrieval (RAG). The background is a softly lit, modern library with faint code snippets visible on floating screens. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a warm, inviting color palette, emphasizing clarity and personalized guidance.

name: personaplex
readme_summary: PersonaPlex is a real-time, full-duplex conversational speech model that allows for persona control via text prompts and voice conditioning. It is built on the Moshi architecture and trained on a mix of synthetic and real conversations to produce natural, low-latency spoken interactions with a consistent persona.
key_features: Persona control through text-based role prompts
Supports CPU offload for memory-constrained GPUs
primary_use_case: Enabling controlled, persona-driven conversational AI interactions via speech.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled puppeteer, with subtle digital threads connecting their hands to a diverse cast of characters (representing different personas), actively directing a live, two-way conversation. One character speaks into a microphone (input speech), and another character, with a distinct visual style and voice bubble, responds dynamically. The background is a softly lit stage with a minimalist control panel displaying waveform visualizations and persona selection icons. The overall mood is one of creative control and seamless interaction, highlighting the model's ability to shape and maintain distinct conversational roles in real-time. 3D isometric illustration style with vibrant colors and clear, friendly character designs.

name: qmd
description: mini cli search engine for your docs, knowledge bases, meeting notes, whatever. Tracking current sota approaches while being all local
readme_summary: QMD is a local, on-device search engine designed to index and query personal documents, notes, and knowledge bases. It combines traditional keyword search, semantic vector search, and LLM re-ranking to provide high-quality, context-aware results, making it ideal for integration with AI agents.
key_features: Supports markdown, meeting transcripts, documentation, and knowledge bases
Combines BM25 full-text search, vector semantic search, and LLM re-ranking
Uses node-llama-cpp with GGUF models for local LLM operations
Contextual indexing for enhanced LLM decision-making
CLI interface with commands for collection management, embedding, searching, and retrieval
JSON and file output formats optimized for AI agent workflows
MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for tighter integration with AI clients (e.g., Claude)
HTTP transport for a shared, long-lived MCP server
primary_use_case: To provide a fast, private, and intelligent search engine for personal and professional documents, enabling users and AI agents to quickly find and utilize information.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, old librarian meticulously organizing a vast, glowing library where each book represents a personal document or note. The librarian uses a magical magnifying glass that, when held over a book, projects a holographic query bubble showing keywords and semantic connections. Surrounding the librarian are floating digital particles and subtle UI elements displaying search results and context trees. The library itself is a cozy, dimly lit study, with soft light illuminating the librarian's focused work. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration, emphasizing the organized and accessible nature of information retrieval, with the repository name 'QMD' subtly etched on a nearby shelf.
